kept.text:
I'm 99% sure that when $AMD gaps up today, at least half the crowd will start or think about trimming positions. 

X “smart” TA guys will absolutely jump in, preaching that the gap will get filled, urging everyone to lock in profits and wait for $320–$350 to reload. Elliott Wave experts will once again scream that $160 is the real buying opportunity — either the end of Wave 5 or the start of Correction A.

It all sounds like the market is being manipulated by these narratives, but the smart move is simple: just follow the whale momentum. When they offer us a discount, we take it. If they don’t, we simply ride the trend with them.

kept.text:
This is huge for $AMD.

They confirmed that GPU-to-CPU ratio in AI infrastructure is shifting from 1:8 toward 1:1.

$GS sees $1 trillion AI compute spending in 2030.

Server GPUs are 5x-10x more expensive than server CPUs. Even if we assume average GPU will be priced 7x the average CPU, we will see server CPU TAM reach $125 billion in 2030.

This is a conservative estimate.

GPU-to-CPU ratio can shift to 1:2 as agentic workflows get longer more autonomous. CPU prices may also increase beyond what we can estimate today if wee see a shortage like we have in memory.

How can you not be bullish on $AMD?

profile_bio.description: Investor | The founder & writer of the Capitalist-Letters newsletter read in +180 countries

quoted_tweet.text: $AMD: “In the past, the CPU-to-GPU ratio was primarily just as a host node in like a 1-to-4 or 1-to-8 configuration. Now [it is] changing and getting closer to a 1-to-1 configuration. You can even imagine if you get lots and lots of agents that you could have more CPUs than GPUs” https://t.co/RNc8eXjAAP

kept.text:
Anlattık böyle olacağını, $AMD 400$’ı gördü. 

Dinleyen ihya oldu. 

Şimdi herkes ne alayım diyor. Yanlış zamanda soruyorsunuz çoğunlukla malesef. 

Ya çok erken tamamı satılıyor bunun sebebi neden aldığını bilmemek ve sinyal odaklı olmak. Ya da hiç ilgilenilmiyor piyasalar kötüyken, bunun sebebi de kötü haber fomosuna kapılıp önünde duran datayı görmezden gelmek. 

Sinyal değil, bilgi öğrenin. Sinyalcileri engellemek için abonelik ücretini 150tl’den 300tl’ye çıkardım. 

Bu kadar portföy yönetimi, stratejiler, bi de aktif portföy yönetimi raporlarını 10 dolar bile etmeyen ücret ile bulmanız mümkün değil. 

Bana karşılıklı sevgi-saygı gösterip, okuduğunu anlayan insanlar yetiyor. Gerisine Allah yardım etsin.

kept.text:
$AMD サーバーCPUのTAM見通しが大幅拡大

わずか半年で、サーバーCPUのTAM（最大市場規模）は600億ドル → 1,200億ドル超へ倍増。
さらに成長率見通しも年率18% → 35%超へ引き上げられました。

背景にあるのは、エージェント型AIの普及による需要構造の変化です。
従来は「CPU : GPU = 1:4〜1:8」が前提でしたが、今後は「1:1」、場合によってはCPU需要が上回る構成も想定されています。

これは単なる短期トレンドではなく、AMDの主力であるサーバーCPU事業の成長上限そのものが引き上がったことを意味します。

詳しい解説は、こちらをご覧ください👇

quoted_tweet.text:
טרייד ה-AI הוא לא טרייד מומנטום הבנוי על נרטיב. זה טרייד בסיסי המעוגן בסייקל השקעות Capex הגדול ביותר בהיסטוריה , המאושר על ידי הכנסות אמיתיות, שולי רווח אמיתיים ומחויבויות אמיתיות של לקוחות.
והחברות בצד המקבל של ההוצאות הללו נותרות הזדמנות ההשקעה המשכנעת ביותר בשוק.
מי אלה החברות האלה? מי אלה החברות שנמצאות לאורך משפך  הכסף הזה? אני יכול לתת לכם כמה דוגמאות:
$NVDA $AVGO $MRVL $AMD $MU $AMAT $KLAC $TER $LRCX $MPWR $SNDK $STX $BE $ETN $VRT $CRDO $LITE $COHR 
כל עוד ההיפרסקיילרס ימשיכו להוציא - והן אישרו באופן חד משמעי שזה מה שיקרה - הכלכלה ממשיכה להתרחב, השוק ממשיך לעלות, ומניות תשתיות הבינה המלאכותית ממשיכים לעבוד.
אבל הרף לא נשאר במקום.
כל רבעון כזה מעלה אותו.
מה שאומר שהסיפור לא צריך להישבר כדי שהשוק ישתנה. צריך פשוט שהציפיות יהיו קשות יותר להשגה..
אז ההתנהגות משתנה.
בשקט בהתחלה. אחר כך בבת אחת.
צריך להיות עם אצבע על הדופק...
#Capex

kept.text:
Wow, I wasn't expecting to wake up to find $AMD trading at nearly $420 overnight!

Data center revenue surging by 57% YoY to $5.8 billion, with server CPU revenue growing by more than 50% YoY were massive drivers.

The company is no longer seen as a PC chip company. They are now establishing themselves as a key player in AI infrastructure.

The big decision I now face is whether to bank any profits or sell my position.

The temptation is very real because I am now sitting on a profit of over 111% in just 3 months.
